methodology: headless simulation 28,000 runs across 22 profiles + 9 analytics reports; 23 detection rules applied via sim-report methodology
verdictReason: No critical failures (no zero-damage bugs, no broken mechanics). 5 HIGH issues including asc20 unplayability, floor difficulty spikes, and final boss damage walls require attention before release. Game is functionally correct but has significant balance/progression issues at extremes.

PRE-EXISTING-1.note: barbed_edge leak noted in preflight. lifetap shows 15.1 avg dmg which may be elevated. No dedicated barbed_edge sim run performed in this track — impact on win rates cannot be isolated.

topFindings: Floor 4->6 difficulty spike is 3.36x (2.0x threshold) across ALL 28,000 runs — most impactful structural issue
Ascension 20 produces 2.7-9.1% win rates vs 32.5% too_hard threshold — fails as a game mode
Floor 18 final bosses (Omnibus/Final Lesson) cause 30.2% floor death rate with 87-91% HP-wipe encounters
